text.content:
2
*�����������������=projector = args[0]
pageName = projector


# add page
node = parent()
page = node.appendCustomPage(pageName)

# add blankout parameter
parName = projector+'blankout'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Blankout',size=4)
para.enableExpr = 'not me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)
for i in para:
	i.normMin = 0
	i.normMax = 100
	i.normVal = 0
	i.default = 0
	i.min = 0
	i.max = 100
	i.clampMin = True
	i.clampMax = False


# add overlap parameter
parName = projector+'overlap'
para = page.appendInt(parName,label='Overlap',size=4)
para.enableExpr = 'not me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)


# add blend parameter
parName = projector+'power'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Power',size=1)
para.enableExpr = 'not me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = 0
	i.normMax = 4
	i.val = 2
	i.default = 2
	i.min = 0
	i.max = 4
	i.clampMin = True
	i.clampMax = False


# add luminance parameter
parName = projector+'luminance'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Luminance',size=1)
para.enableExpr = 'not me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = 0
	i.normMax = 1
	i.normVal = 0.5
	i.default = 0.5
	i.min = 0
	i.max = 1
	i.clampMin = True
	i.clampMax = False


# add Gamma parameter
parName = projector+'gamma'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Gamma',size=3)
para.enableExpr = 'not me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = 1.8
	i.normMax = 2.2
	i.default = 1.8
	i.val = 1.8
	i.min = 1
	i.max = 3
	i.clampMin = False
	i.clampMax = False


# add Hue adjust
parName = projector + 'hue'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Hue Adjust RGB',size=3)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = -1
	i.normMax = 1
	i.default = 0
	i.min = -1
	i.max = 1
	i.clampMin = False
	i.clampMax = False


# add Saturation adjust
parName = projector + 'sat'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Saturation Adjust RGB',size=3)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = -1
	i.normMax = 1
	i.default = 0
	i.min = -1
	i.max = 1
	i.clampMin = False
	i.clampMax = False


# add Value adjust
parName = projector + 'val'
para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Value Adjust RGB',size=3)

for i in para:
	i.normMin = -1
	i.normMax = 1
	i.default = 0
	i.min = -1
	i.max = 1
	i.clampMin = False
	i.clampMax = False


# add per side switch
parName = projector+'perside'
para = page.appendToggle(parName,label='Per Side Control')

for i in para:
	i.default = 0

# add per side blend, luminance and gamma

allSides = ['Left','Right','Top','Bottom']
for j,v in enumerate(allSides):

	# add offset parameter
	corners = ['Blankout','Overlap']
	for k,c in enumerate(corners):
		parName = projector+'pos'+str(j)+'c'+str(k)
		para = page.appendInt(parName,label=c+' '+v, size=2)
		para.enableExpr = 'me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

		for i in para:
			i.normMin = 0
			i.normMax = 500
			i.normVal = 0
			i.default = 0
			i.enable = 0
			i.min = 0
			i.max = 500
			i.clampMin = True
			i.clampMax = False


	# add blend parameter
	parName = projector+'powers'+str(j)
	para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Power '+v,size=1)
	para.enableExpr = 'me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

	for i in para:
		i.normMin = 0
		i.normMax = 4
		i.val = 2
		i.default = 2
		i.enable = 0
		i.min = 0
		i.max = 4
		i.clampMin = True
		i.clampMax = False


	# add luminance parameter
	parName = projector+'luminances'+str(j)
	para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Luminance '+v,size=1)
	para.enableExpr = 'me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

	for i in para:
		i.normMin = 0
		i.normMax = 1
		i.normVal = 0.5
		i.default = 0.5
		i.enable = 0
		i.min = 0
		i.max = 1
		i.clampMin = True
		i.clampMax = False


	# add Gamma parameter
	parName = projector+'gammas'+str(j)
	para = page.appendFloat(parName,label='Gamma '+v,size=3)
	para.enableExpr = 'me.par.{}perside'.format(projector)

	for i in para:
		i.normMin = 1.8
		i.normMax = 2.2
		i.default = 1.8
		i.val = 1.8
		i.min = 1
		i.max = 3
		i.enable = 0
		i.clampMin = True
		i.clampMax = False

# sort pages
allPages = [page.name for page in node.customPages]
# Ensure pages are sorted: 'Projector Blend', then all 'Projector X' pages, then 'About'
projectorPages = [p for p in allPages if p not in ('Projector Blend', 'About')]
projectorPages.sort(key=lambda x: int(x.split()[-1]) if x.startswith('Projector ') and x.split()[-1].isdigit() else float('inf'))
sortedPages = ['Projector Blend'] + projectorPages + ['About']
node.sortCustomPages(*sortedPages)

2
*������������������rallPages = [i for i in parent().customPages]
allPages.remove('Projector Blend')
		
for i in allPages:
	i.destroy()
